title: CLOTHING CLOSET - 211info
text: DAYTON COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet with coats and shoes. Items available are dependent on donations and funding.
